title: solanum indicum var. nguelense
intro: Solanum indicum var. nguelense, also known as the 'Nightshade', is a plant species in the Solanaceae family, characterized by its dark green leaves and small, purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Solanum indicum var. nguelense lie in its roots and leaves, which contain alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Solanum indicum var. nguelense can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
